sections.paragraph:
Original: חזה חזא

Transliteration: chăzâ' chăzâh

Phonetic: khaz-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to see, behold
    1. (Peal)
      1. to see
      2. to see, behold, witness
      3. to behold (in a dream or vision)
      4. customary, seemly (passive)

Origin: corresponding to H2372

TWOT entry: 2725

Part(s) of speech: Verb
